description: A manufacturing company is submitting its annual water usage report to the state environmental protection agency.

nodes.task_description: Identify the company and the specific report they need to file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the company and the correct reporting form.

nodes.task_description: Guide the user through the online portal to input their water usage data.

expected_outcome.value: Agent helps the user accurately populate the report fields.

nodes.task_description: Accept the report submission and provide a confirmation number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully logs the submission and provides a receipt.
